demo.title: Fund the live USDG achievement prize pool + help NFT holders claim, from X posts
demo.code:
@bankrbot fund the robinhood prize pool with 25 USDG

-> 1. USDG.approve(pool, 25000000) — exact amount only
   2. fund(25000000) on the LIVE pool 0xF20c8d3B…7D21
   3. Reply: tx link + new poolBalance()
   Funded USDG can never be admin-withdrawn — only claim() to NFT owners.

@bankrbot can NFT #42 claim achievement 7?
-> isEligible(7, collection, 42) + hasClaimed(...) — free reads, reply with facts

setup: Requires the Bankr skill with an API key configured and wallet funded on Robinhood Chain (chain 4663)
The pool is ALREADY DEPLOYED at 0xF20c8d3B7EB81A2cf100e99690DA2E4D79F47D21 (Sourcify exact_match) — never deploy it
You can fund() and read; addAchievement/attest are admin-only (MfT agent wallet) — route those to @memefortrees
One-time achievements must be claimed by the NFT owner's own wallet — pre-check isEligible + hasClaimed before any tx
